title: Relationship Manager – Offshore Wealth (South East Asia)
description:
Relationship Manager – Offshore Wealth (South East Asia)

A leading international financial institution is continuing to grow its offshore wealth management platform and is seeking an experienced Relationship Manager to cover the South East Asia market, based in Singapore.

This role is designed for a commercially driven wealth professional with strong regional connectivity, a proven ability to acquire offshore clients, and the capability to deliver cross-border wealth solutions across multiple South East Asian markets.

Key Responsibilities

  • Acquire, manage, and grow a portfolio of offshore high-net-worth clients across South East Asia

  • Drive new client acquisition through personal networks, referrals, and targeted market development

  • Deliver holistic offshore wealth solutions including investments, portfolio advisory, lending, and insurance

  • Build trusted, long-term client relationships with entrepreneurs, families, and professionals

  • Partner closely with internal product specialists to provide tailored solutions

  • Ensure full compliance with cross-border, regulatory, and internal governance requirements

Requirements

  • Minimum 3–5 years of offshore wealth or private banking experience

  • Established exposure to South East Asia markets (e.g. Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, Philippines, Vietnam)

  • Solid understanding of offshore investment products and portfolio construction

  • Strong interpersonal, advisory, and stakeholder management skills

  • Ideal candidate profile: 7–10 years of experience, mid-career to senior RM level

Why Join

  • Well-established offshore platform with strong regional presence

  • Broad range of investment and advisory capabilities

  • Structured career progression within offshore wealth management

  • Competitive compensation with performance-based incentives

All applications will be handled with strict confidentiality.


EA Licence: R1110891 | Licence No.: 24S2411

postedCompany.description:
We’re LMA, a professional recruitment agency that’s powered by curiosity. We’re here to create better outcomes for clients and jobseekers all around the world, by asking better, more meaningful questions that lead to positive change, for their companies, and their careers.

For our clients it gives us the ability to know your company better. To understand what ‘cultural fit’ really means. To find the candidate that’s ready for next, as well as right now.

For the candidates we serve, our curiosity drives deeper relationships, getting to know the real you, and not the you that only exists on paper. We operate within the finance, banking & financial services, human resources, operations, business support sectors across the UK, Asia and the US.
